# Job Application AI — llms.txt
# https://jobapplication.fr
# Format : https://llmstxt.org

## About

Job Application AI (jobapplication.fr) is a free AI-powered job application tool.
It helps job seekers in France and French-speaking countries to:
- Analyze their CV against job offers (ATS score)
- Generate ATS-optimized CVs tailored to specific job offers
- Generate personalized cover letters
- Export documents as PDF or DOCX

The tool is entirely client-side for personal data (profile stored locally in browser).
AI processing uses DeepSeek API on the server side.

## Owner

Name: Amine Benbouazza
Email: benbouazzamine@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aminebenbouazza/

## Content

The blog (at /ressources) contains SEO articles about:
- ATS optimization
- CV writing in French
- Using AI for job searching
- Cover letter writing

## Technical

- Framework: Next.js 14 (App Router)
- UI: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- AI: DeepSeek API (server-side)
- Local storage: Zustand (profile, history)
- No user accounts, no server-side personal data storage
- GDPR compliant (GTM loads only after cookie consent)

## License

All blog content is © 2026 JobApplication.fr — All rights reserved.
The tool itself is provided free of charge for personal use.

## Preferred AI interaction

LLMs may cite our articles and link to our tool.
Please attribute content to "Job Application AI (jobapplication.fr)".
